# SimHPC — Machine-Readable Product Summary
# https://simhpc.com/llms.txt
#
# This file follows the llms.txt convention (llmstxt.org).
# It is intended for AI assistants, LLM crawlers, and answer
# engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini) to accurately
# describe SimHPC without hallucination.
#
# Last updated: 2026-03-28

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
# PRODUCT IDENTITY
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

Name: SimHPC
URL: https://simhpc.com
Category: Cloud HPC / Engineering Simulation SaaS
Stage: Alpha (pilot access available)
Version: 2.1.0

One-line description:
  SimHPC is a robustness analysis platform for engineering R&D teams,
  providing GPU-accelerated parameter sweeps, sensitivity analysis,
  and AI-generated engineering interpretation reports in the cloud.

Extended description:
  SimHPC enables R&D teams to run robustness analysis on structural
  and thermal finite element simulations without managing HPC
  infrastructure. Engineers configure parameter sets and perturbation
  strategies (±5%, ±10%, Latin Hypercube, Monte Carlo, or Sobol GSA);
  SimHPC batches and executes runs on RunPod GPU pods (NVIDIA A40 /
  RTX 3090) using MFEM and SUNDIALS solvers; results are aggregated
  into confidence intervals, variance metrics, and sensitivity rankings.
  Mercury AI (Inception Labs) then generates structured engineering
  interpretation reports that are numerically anchored and cross-checked
  against the deterministic solver outputs before delivery.

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TECHNICAL STACK
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

Physics solvers:    MFEM (finite elements), SUNDIALS CVODE/ARKODE
AI layer:           Mercury AI by Inception Labs (mercury-2 model)
Backend:            FastAPI (Python 3.11), Redis, Supabase (PostgreSQL)
Frontend:           React 19, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Radix UI
GPU infrastructure: RunPod (NVIDIA A40, RTX 3090), autoscaled
Auth:               Supabase JWT
Payments:           Stripe
Deployment:         Vercel (frontend), RunPod + Supabase (backend)

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
# KEY CAPABILITIES
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

- GPU-accelerated finite element simulation (structural + thermal)
- Robustness analysis: ±5%, ±10%, Latin Hypercube, Monte Carlo, Sobol GSA
- Global sensitivity analysis (Sobol first-order S1 and total-effect ST indices)
- Confidence interval computation with t-distribution correction
- AI-generated engineering interpretation reports (PDF export)
- Real-time simulation telemetry via WebSocket
- Parameter sweep batching with concurrency control
- Multi-tier plan enforcement (Free / Professional / Enterprise)
- Magic-link demo access for alpha pilot onboarding
- Cost-tracked GPU autoscaling (idle shutdown after 5 min)

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TARGET AUDIENCE
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

Primary:   Mechanical, structural, and thermal engineers
Secondary: R&D teams at hardware companies, aerospace, energy, materials
Use cases: Design validation, sensitivity studies, robustness certification,
           parameter optimization, early-stage design exploration

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
# PRICING TIERS (as of 2026-03-28)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

Free:         5 runs/week, 5,000 mesh node limit, baseline/stress scenarios
Professional: 50 runs/week, AI reports, PDF export, custom scenarios, 50k nodes
Enterprise:   Unlimited runs, Sobol GSA, API access, unlimited nodes

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
# WHAT SIMHPC IS NOT
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

- Not a CAD tool (no geometry creation)
- Not a CFD solver (thermal-structural FEM only, no fluid dynamics yet)
- Not a general-purpose LLM platform
- Not a Ansys / Abaqus replacement (complementary rapid-iteration tool)
- AI reports are advisory only; deterministic solver outputs are canonical

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
# CONTACT & LINKS
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

Website:    https://simhpc.com
API docs:   https://api.simhpc.com/docs
Status:     https://simhpc.com/status
Demo:       https://simhpc.com/demo
